---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or an enhancement to an existing one
title: "[feat] "
labels: type/feature
---

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve, and for whom (analyst, MLRO, regulator, operator)? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like to happen. Describe the behaviour, not just the implementation. -->

## Affected components

<!-- Files / routes / registries, e.g. web/lib/server/..., src/brain/... -->

## Compliance & governance impact

<!-- Regulated compliance platform: be explicit. Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Touches a regulated route, auth, audit chain, egress, or four-eyes gate
- [ ] Adds/changes an AI model, prompt, or reasoning mode (prompt-hash / model registry impact)
- [ ] Changes a risk-appetite threshold, KRI, or bias/drift floor
- [ ] Requires a governance decision per [`GOVERNANCE.md`](../../GOVERNANCE.md) §2
- [ ] No compliance or governance impact

<!-- If any of the first four are checked, note the relevant regulatory anchor
     (e.g. UAE FDL 10/2025 Art.18, FATF R.10) and expected register update. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you evaluated and why you discarded them. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, links, related issues, or COMPLIANCE_GAPS.md references. -->

> ⚠️ Do **not** include real customer PII, sanctions hits, or secrets in this issue.
